{{Infobox concept
| name = Blue (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Blue is an object that was being calibrated by the [[Lichborn woman]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Blue is a [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Blue is a character who gives orders to Green.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Blue uses telekinesis to enter the [[Blue Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“...but I finished calibrating Blue right before you were supposed to arrive, and then when you didn’t show up I kept running tests, so I don’t have anything⁠—”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Hold off, Green. We’ll need to last longer."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
